auth_login_subtitle: Welcome back! Please sign in to continue.
auth_register_subtitle: Join Echoroo to start analyzing your audio recordings
auth_register_password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number
auth_forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_forgot_password_success_body: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
auth_forgot_password_no_email_hint: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder or try again with a different email address.
error_required_email_password: Please enter your email and password
error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
error_captcha_failed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error_password_complexity: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number
error_display_name_too_long: Display name must be less than 100 characters
dashboard_description: Welcome to Echoroo. Organize your bioacoustic monitoring work into projects, upload recordings, run ML-powered species detection, and review results.
dashboard_step1_body: Set up a project to group your monitoring sites and recordings.
dashboard_step2_body: Define monitoring sites and upload audio recordings from the field.
dashboard_step3_body: Use ML models (BirdNET, Perch) to automatically detect and classify species.
dashboard_step4_body: Validate detections, review spectrograms, and export findings as reports.
detection_description: Review species detections and confirm or reject automated results.
detection_no_activity_data: No activity pattern data available for this species.
detection_no_detections_yet_body: Run a detection model or add detections manually to get started.
detection_no_species_match_title: No species match the current filters
detection_no_species_match_body: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.
detection_no_results_body: No detections match the current filters.
detection_no_status_results_body: There are no detections with status "{status}" for the current filters.
project_no_projects_body: Get started by creating a new project.
project_new_description: Set up a new bioacoustic analysis project to organize your recordings and annotations.
project_new_name_hint: A descriptive name for your project
project_new_description_placeholder: What is this project about? What are your goals?
project_new_description_hint: Optional description of your project goals
project_new_target_taxa_hint: Select the taxonomic groups you're focusing on (optional)
project_new_visibility_private_hint: Only you and invited members can access
project_new_name_too_long: Project name must be less than 200 characters
project_new_error: Failed to create project. Please try again.
project_detail_delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete all recordings, annotations, and data associated with this project.
project_detail_error_forbidden: You do not have permission to view this project
project_settings_description: Manage your project settings and visibility. Only project admins can edit these settings.
project_settings_target_taxa_hint: Select the taxonomic groups you're focusing on (optional)
project_settings_visibility_private_hint: Only you and invited members can access
project_settings_access_denied: You do not have permission to edit this project
project_settings_error_forbidden: You do not have permission to access this project
project_settings_error_save: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
project_settings_error_permission: You do not have permission to edit this project
project_settings_name_too_long: Project name must be less than 200 characters
profile_info_description: Update your display name and organization information.
profile_email_cannot_change: Your email address cannot be changed.
profile_display_name_hint: This name will be shown to other users. Maximum 100 characters.
profile_organization_hint: Your organization or affiliation. Maximum 200 characters.
profile_security_description: Manage your password and security settings.
profile_api_tokens_description: Manage API tokens for programmatic access.
setup_footer: This will create your administrator account and complete the initial setup.
form_site_location_hint: Click on the map to select an H3 hexagon for this site.
form_dataset_site_cannot_change: Site cannot be changed after creation
form_dataset_recorder_hint: Recording device used for this dataset
validation_location_required: Please select a location on the map
members_error_forbidden: You do not have permission to access this project
members_access_denied: You do not have permission to manage project members
annotation_project_description: Manage annotation workflows for audio clips
annotation_project_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
annotation_project_delete_warning_annota: All clip annotations and sound events
annotation_project_empty: No annotation projects found. Create your first annotation project to get started.
annotation_form_instructions_placeholder: Instructions displayed to annotators during the annotation workflow
annotation_form_instructions_hint: These instructions will be shown to annotators when they work on tasks in this project.
annotation_form_visibility_hint: Private projects are only visible to project members.
annotation_task_generate_success: Task generation started. Tasks will appear shortly.
annotation_task_no_tasks: No pending tasks available. All tasks may be completed or assigned.
annotation_task_empty_filter: No tasks match the selected filter.
annotation_task_empty_hint: Click Generate Tasks to create tasks from dataset clips.
annotation_task_batch_no_tags: No tags available for this annotation project.
annotation_review_empty_hint: All annotations have been reviewed, or no tasks have been submitted for review yet.
annotation_review_panel_approved_notice: This annotation has been approved and cannot be changed.
annotation_review_panel_reject_error: A comment is required when rejecting an annotation.
annotation_workspace_selection_not_found: Selection not found. Click an annotation to select it.
annotation_workspace_select_annotation_h: Select an annotation to tag it, or tag the whole clip below.
annotation_tag_description: Manage labels for sound events and clips
annotation_tag_empty_filter: No tags match the current filters.
annotation_tag_empty: No tags yet. Create your first tag.
annotation_tag_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
annotation_navigator_complete_title: Complete this task and move to the next (Ctrl+Enter)
annotation_navigator_complete_aria: Complete task and go to next
recording_detail_time_expansion_hint: Playback speed adjustment for ultrasonic recordings
recording_detail_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recording? This action cannot be undone.
dataset_list_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dataset_detail_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
datetime_config_description: Parse date and time from recording filenames
datetime_config_template_description: Type YYYY, MM, DD, hh, mm, ss below the filename to mark date/time positions
datetime_config_template_help: Y=Year, M=Month, D=Day, h=Hour, m=Minute, s=Second
datetime_config_timezone_hint: Timezone of the recording device. Used to convert filename timestamps to UTC.
datetime_config_custom_instruction: Click and drag on the filename to select characters, then assign them as a datetime part.
report_description: Export project data for analysis and model training
site_detail_no_datasets: No datasets found at this site.
site_detail_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings_change_password_description: Update your password to keep your account secure.
settings_profile_description: Update your display name and organization.
settings_api_tokens_description: API tokens allow programmatic access to your account. Keep them secure.
settings_no_tokens_hint: Create a token to access the API programmatically
settings_revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this token? This action cannot be undone.
api_tokens_description: Manage API tokens for programmatic access to Echoroo
api_tokens_no_tokens_hint: Get started by creating a new API token.
api_tokens_revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the token "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
api_tokens_token_name_hint: A descriptive name to identify this token
api_tokens_important_warning_body: The token will be displayed only once after creation. Make sure to copy and store it securely.
api_tokens_security_warning: Warning: This is your only chance to copy this token
api_tokens_security_warning_body: For security reasons, this token will not be shown again. Make sure to copy it now and store it in a safe place.
token_dialog_token_name_hint: A descriptive name to identify this token
token_dialog_expiration_hint: Leave empty for a token that never expires
token_dialog_important_body: This token will only be shown once. Copy it now and store it securely.
annotation_list_draw_hint: Draw on the spectrogram to add one.
clip_list_no_clips_hint: Create clips manually or use auto-generation
data_export_audio_warning: Warning: This may result in a very large download
detection_viz_no_activity_body: Activity patterns appear after detections are recorded.
admin_settings_registration_description: Control how new users can register for the system
admin_settings_registration_mode_invitat: Invitation Only - Requires an invite code
admin_settings_allow_registration_descri: Enable or disable new user registrations
admin_settings_session_timeout_hint: How long a user session remains active without activity (1-10080 minutes)
admin_settings_detection_species_filter_: Filter detected species using a location-based model
admin_users_empty_description: Try adjusting your search or filters.
admin_licenses_description: Manage licenses for recordings and datasets
admin_licenses_empty_description: Get started by creating a new license.
admin_licenses_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this license? This action cannot be undone.
admin_recorders_empty_description: Get started by adding a new recorder.
admin_recorders_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this recorder? This action cannot be undone.
ml_analysis_model_birdnet_desc: Species detection optimized for bird identification
embedding_desc: Generate embedding vectors for similarity search
search_description: Upload an audio clip to find similar sounds across your project recordings.
project_overview_no_data_desc: Upload recordings to your datasets to see an overview here.
search_drop_audio: Drop audio file here or click to upload
search_audio_hint: Supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG (recommended: 3–10 seconds)
search_no_results_hint: Try lowering the minimum similarity threshold or uploading a different audio clip.
search_no_embeddings: No embeddings available. Run ML analysis with Perch or BirdNET first.
search_error_no_file: Please select an audio file to search.
search_no_species_hint: Click "Add Species" to choose which species you want to search for, then add reference sounds for each.
search_species_selector_custom_hint: Or enter a scientific name not in this project:
search_no_sources_hint: Click "Add Source" to upload an audio file or add a recording from a URL.
search_drop_zone_text: Drag and drop an audio file here
search_clip_short_warning: Short clip — will be padded to {seconds}s
search_validation_hint: Add reference sounds for all species before searching
search_results_no_matches_species_hint: Try lowering the similarity threshold or adding more reference sounds.
search_results_no_matches_hint: Try lowering the similarity threshold, using a different model, or adding higher-quality reference recordings.
search_no_sessions_hint: Start a new search to find similar sounds across your recordings.
search_time_no_datetime: No datetime information available for these results
search_no_results_in_range_hint: Adjust the similarity range slider above
search_aria_spiral: Similarity results plotted by time of day
models_description: Train custom classifiers on your labeled data
models_select_sessions: Select search sessions for training data
models_min_samples: Minimum 5 confirmed and 5 rejected results required
models_create_dialog_subtitle: Train a custom SVM classifier using labeled search results
models_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
models_apply_description: Run this model on all recordings in a dataset
models_apply_success: Model applied successfully. View results in Detections.
models_recent_applications_empty: No applications yet. Click "Apply to Dataset" to run this model.
models_review_select_session_hint: Select a search session to review
models_review_no_results: No results found in this session
models_review_mark_all_positive_title: Mark all results in this band as positive
models_review_mark_all_negative_title: Mark all results in this band as negative
models_trained_continue_al_hint: Training complete. Label more samples and retrain to improve accuracy.
models_review_train_tooltip: Open model creation dialog with this session pre-selected
models_review_train_tooltip_disabled: Label at least 5 positives and 5 negatives first
models_review_suggest_more_hint: Use 'Suggest Next Samples' below to find more examples
models_review_keyboard_hint: Keyboard: 1/2/3 = Agree (signal quality), D = Disagree, U = Unsure, ← → = navigate
vote_agree_title: Agree — click to select signal quality (A)
site_list_description: Manage geographic locations for your recordings
site_list_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
sites_data_description: Manage sites, datasets, and recordings for this project
sites_data_site_description: Manage geographic locations for your recordings
dataset_list_empty: No datasets found. Create your first dataset to get started.
form_dataset_datetime_desc: Configure how to extract recording datetime from filenames. If not provided, file modification time will be used.
form_dataset_regex_hint: Regular expression to extract datetime from filename
file_upload_hashing_hint: Verifying integrity of {count} file(s). This may take a moment for large files.
clip_detail_note_placeholder: Add a note about this clip...
data_export_description: Export "{name}" in CamtrapDP format. This includes metadata files (deployments.csv, media.csv) and a datapackage.json file.
recording_list_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{filename}"? This will also delete all associated clips.
site_list_empty: No sites found. Create your first site to get started.
file_drop_drag: Drag and drop audio files here
file_drop_formats: WAV, FLAC, MP3, OGG, OPUS • max 1 GB per file • up to 500 files
upload_progress_hint: Uploading {count} file(s) — up to {concurrency} at a time
annotation_sets_list_description: Curated ground-truth sets used for reviewing segments and evaluating models.
annotation_sets_list_empty_description: Create your first annotation set to start collecting labelled ground truth.
annotation_sets_create_subtitle: Choose a source dataset, configure filters, and define the segment geometry.
annotation_sets_create_dataset_hint: Segments are sampled from recordings in this dataset.
annotation_sets_create_dataset_empty: No datasets are available in this project.
annotation_sets_create_filters_descripti: Optional filters that narrow the sampling pool. Leave blank to sample from the full dataset.
annotation_sets_create_geometry_descript: Configure how the sampler chops the source dataset into reviewable segments.
annotation_sets_create_geometry_count_hi: Budget for this set. The sampler may return fewer if the pool is small.
annotation_sets_create_validation_length: Segment length must be at least 10 seconds.
annotation_sets_create_validation_count: Number of segments must be at least 1.
annotation_sets_create_validation_date: End date must be on or after start date.
annotation_sets_detail_sampling_descript: The sampler is selecting segments in the background. This page updates automatically.
annotation_sets_detail_delete_confirm: Delete this annotation set? All segments and annotations will be lost.
annotation_sets_palette_description: Species that appear as quick picks while annotating. Add from project taxonomy or GBIF.
annotation_sets_evaluation_description: Compare detector outputs against this ground truth.
annotation_sets_evaluation_coming_soon: Evaluation UI will be available in a later phase.
evaluation_dialog_description: Select detection models to compare against this annotation set. Each model will be evaluated independently using symmetric overlap matching.
evaluation_dialog_custom_empty: No trained custom models available for this project.
evaluation_dialog_submit_error: Failed to start evaluation. Please try again.
evaluation_dialog_select_at_least_one: Select at least one model to evaluate.
evaluation_dialog_in_progress_warning: This annotation set is still in progress. Evaluation will run against the current annotations only.
evaluation_run_delete_confirm: Delete this evaluation run and all its results?
evaluation_run_list_empty: No evaluation runs yet. Click "Run evaluation" to start one.
evaluation_dashboard_pending: Results will appear here once the evaluation finishes.
evaluation_dashboard_summary_description: Overall precision, recall, and F1 aggregated across all species in the palette.
evaluation_dashboard_species_description: F1 by species across evaluated models. Colour encodes F1 quality (green = strong, red = weak).
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_precision: TP / (TP + FP) — fraction of detections that match an annotation.
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_recall: TP / (TP + FN) — fraction of annotations that were detected.
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_f1: Harmonic mean of precision and recall.
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_tp_p: True positives from the detections-side view.
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_tp_r: True positives from the annotations-side view.
evaluation_dashboard_tooltip_fp: Detections that did not match any annotation.
evaluation_dashboard_empty_model: This model produced no detections on the evaluated segments.
annotation_editor_complete_title: Mark annotated and move to next segment (Ctrl+Enter)
annotation_editor_readonly_hint: This segment is already completed. Changes are saved immediately.
annotation_editor_drag_hint: Drag on the spectrogram to select a time range, then choose a species.
annotation_editor_draft_prompt: Choose a species from the palette or search below.
annotation_editor_palette_empty: The palette is empty. Search to add species.
annotation_editor_palette_click_hint: Click a species to apply to the current draft or the selected annotation.
annotation_editor_annotations_empty: No annotations on this segment yet.
annotation_editor_no_vocalization_error: Remove annotations before marking as no-vocalization.
